hero.subtitle: Track price and news data, describe your conditions to AI, and let the system automatically send trade orders when conditions are met.

preview.input_example: Buy BTC when RSI drops below 30 on 4h chart
preview.ai_response_3: Will execute market buy when triggered.

how.title: Automated trading in three steps
how.step1_desc: Track assets, equities, indices and news feeds in real time.
how.step2_desc: Tell the AI your conditions in plain language. No coding required.
how.step3_desc: When conditions are met, the system automatically sends trade orders to your connected broker.

faqs.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faqs.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Upis Delta.
faqs.still_desc: Join our community or reach out directly.
faqs.community_reach: Join our community or reach out directly.
faqs.a_0: Upis Delta is a data-driven trading platform that provides real-time market and news data, an AI-powered condition engine, and automated order execution.
faqs.a_1: Not exactly. It executes orders only based on the conditions you define.
faqs.a_2: Create an account, verify email, connect your broker API, define conditions, activate strategy.
faqs.a_3: System runs server-side. Orders still execute automatically.
faqs.a_4: Yes, multiple strategies across symbols and conditions are supported.
faqs.a_5: Yes. Only you can access them.
faqs.a_6: No. This is only a data and execution platform.
faqs.a_7: Binance and OKX supported. Others in progress.
faqs.a_8: Not yet. Web platform only for now.
faqs.a_9: Keys are encrypted. Use trade-only permissions.
faqs.q_10: Can I use Upis Delta for stocks?
faqs.a_10: Stock support is planned for Phase 3 with Alpaca and Interactive Brokers integration.
faqs.a_11: Yes. The free plan includes basic features with limited strategy slots.
faqs.q_12: How does the AI condition engine work?
faqs.a_12: Describe your trading conditions in plain language. The AI converts them into executable rules.
faqs.a_13: Backtesting is being developed as part of Phase 2.
faqs.a_14: We use real-time market data from exchanges and curated news feeds.
faqs.q_15: How do I connect my broker?
faqs.a_15: Go to Settings > API Keys, enter your broker API key with trade-only permissions.
faqs.q_16: Is there an API for developers?
faqs.a_16: A public API is planned for Phase 4.
faqs.q_17: How do I cancel my subscription?
faqs.a_17: You can cancel anytime from Settings. Your strategies will be paused.
faqs.a_18: Report bugs on our GitHub repository or Discord server.

settings.title: Settings
settings.email_cannot_change: Email cannot be changed. Contact support if needed.
settings.password_min_length: Password must be at least 8 characters.
settings.password_uppercase: Password must contain an uppercase letter.
settings.password_special: Password must contain a special character.
settings.api_warning_suffix: API keys. Never enable deposit or withdrawal permissions.
settings.api_key_required: API Key and Secret are required.
settings.pref_email_notif_desc: Receive trade alerts and strategy updates via email
settings.pref_performance_desc: Display P&L and win rate on the dashboard
settings.danger_deactivate_desc: Immediately stop all live trading strategies.
settings.danger_delete_keys_desc: Remove all stored broker API keys. You'll need to re-add them.
settings.danger_delete_account_desc: Permanently delete your account and all associated data. This action cannot be undone.
settings.danger_delete_account_feedback: Account deletion is not yet implemented.

help.title: Help and Support
help.subtitle_text: Find answers to common questions or
help.reach_out: Our team is here to help you get the most out of Upis Delta.
help.s0_q0: How do I create an account?
help.s0_a0: Click 'Register' on the homepage, fill in your details, and verify your email address.
help.s0_q1: How do I connect my broker?
help.s0_a1: Navigate to Settings > API Keys in your dashboard. Enter your broker's API key with trade-only permissions.
help.s0_a2: We accept Gmail, Outlook, Hotmail, and Proton Mail.
help.s1_q0: How do I create a strategy?
help.s1_a0: From your dashboard, click 'New Strategy' and describe your trading conditions in plain language.
help.s1_q1: Can I edit conditions after creating a strategy?
help.s1_a1: Yes. Open any strategy and modify conditions through the chat interface.
help.s1_q2: What happens when conditions are met?
help.s1_a2: The system automatically sends the configured order to your connected broker.
help.s2_q0: How do I reset my password?
help.s2_a0: Click 'Forgot password?' on the login page and follow the email instructions.
help.s2_q1: Is my API key stored securely?
help.s2_a1: Yes. All API keys are encrypted at rest and never exposed in the UI after initial entry.
help.s2_a2: 2FA is planned for a future release. We'll notify you when it's available.
help.s3_a0: We offer Free, Plus, and Pro plans. Check the pricing page for details.
help.s3_q1: How do I upgrade my plan?
help.s3_a1: Go to Settings > Billing and select your desired plan.
help.s3_a2: Yes. Cancel anytime from Settings. Your strategies will be paused but not deleted.
help.s4_q0: My orders aren't executing. What should I check?
help.s4_a0: Verify your API key is valid, has trade permissions, and your strategy is set to 'Active'.
help.s4_a1: Check your spam folder. If still missing, try resending from the login page or contact support.
help.s4_a2: Try clearing your browser cache or switching to a different browser. If the issue persists, contact support.
